findings.reason: เช้า is a low class consonant (ช) with a special vowel (เ-า) and mai tho (้), which produces a high tone, not falling.
ท้าย is a low class consonant (ท) with a long vowel, live ending, and mai tho (้), which produces a high tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ตอนนี้เราก็มีข้อมูลพอ
findings.romanization: dtawn nii rao go mii kho-muun phaw
findings.reason: ข้อ is a high class consonant (ข) with mai tho (้), which produces a falling tone, not high.
ประ is a mid class consonant (ป) with a short vowel and dead ending, which produces a low tone, not mid.

findings.thai: ตอนอ่านแชต
findings.reason: According to Thai spelling rules, แชต (low class consonant ช, long vowel แ-, dead ending ต) produces a falling tone, although it is often pronounced with a high tone as a loanword.
ตอบ is a mid class consonant (ต) with a long vowel and dead ending (บ), which produces a low tone, not high.
ตอบ is a mid class consonant (ต) with a long vowel and dead ending (บ), which produces a low tone, not high.

findings.thai: ตั้งใจทำงานชิ้นนี้มาก
findings.reason: ชิ้น is a low class consonant (ช) with a live ending and mai tho (้), which produces a high tone, not falling.
ตั๋ว is a mid class consonant (ต) with mai chattawa (๋), which produces a rising tone, not mid.
ใหม่ has a high class leading consonant (ห) with mai ek (่), which produces a low tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ต่างฝ่ายยังฟังกัน
findings.reason: ต่าง (mid class ต + mai ek ่) and ฝ่าย (high class ฝ + mai ek ่) both produce low tones, not falling.
ใหม่ has a high class leading consonant (ห) with mai ek (่), which produces a low tone, not falling.
